ddls:
CREATE TABLE "studies" (
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each study */,
  "study_name" TEXT /* Name of the study */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the study */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the study */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the study */,
  "study_lead" TEXT /* Lead researcher of the study */,
  "study_status" TEXT /* Status of the study (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the study was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the study was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study the patient is part of */,
  "consent_date" TEXT /* Date the patient gave consent */,
  "withdrawal_date" TEXT /* Date the patient withdrew from the study */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the patient */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the patient */,
  "medical_history" TEXT /* Medical history of the patient */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patients_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "survey_questions" (
  "question_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each question */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study the question belongs to */,
  "question_text" TEXT /* Text of the survey question */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the question (e.g., integer, string) */,
  "question_format" TEXT /* Format of the question (e.g., multiple choice, open-ended) */,
  "validation_rules" TEXT /* Validation rules for the question */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survey_questions_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "survey_responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient who gave the response */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* ID of the question being answered */,
  "response_date" TEXT /* Date the response was given */,
  "response_value" TEXT /* Value of the response */,
  "response_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the response */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survey_responses_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES survey_questions ("question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survey_responses_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "medical_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each condition */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient with the condition */,
  "condition_name" TEXT /* Name of the medical condition */,
  "diagnosis_date" TEXT /* Date the condition was diagnosed */,
  "icd_code" TEXT /* ICD code for the condition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medical_conditions_condition_name FOREIGN KEY ("condition_name") REFERENCES condition_types ("type_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medical_conditions_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "condition_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each condition type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the condition type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the condition type */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the condition type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hash of the user's password */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient whose data is being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "missing_value_codes" (
  "code_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each missing value code */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* ID of the question the code belongs to */,
  "code_value" TEXT /* Value of the missing value code */,
  "code_description" TEXT /* Description of the missing value code */,
  "code_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the missing value code */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("code_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_missing_value_codes_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES survey_questions ("question_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enumerations" (
  "enum_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enumeration */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* ID of the question the enumeration belongs to */,
  "enum_value" TEXT /* Value of the enumeration */,
  "enum_description" TEXT /* Description of the enumeration */,
  "enum_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the enumeration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enum_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enumerations_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES survey_questions ("question_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each unit */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* ID of the question the unit belongs to */,
  "unit_name" TEXT /* Name of the unit */,
  "unit_description" TEXT /* Description of the unit */,
  "unit_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the unit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_units_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES survey_questions ("question_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patterns" (
  "pattern_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pattern */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* ID of the question the pattern belongs to */,
  "pattern_name" TEXT /* Name of the pattern */,
  "pattern_description" TEXT /* Description of the pattern */,
  "pattern_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the pattern */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pattern_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patterns_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES survey_questions ("question_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "terms" (
  "term_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each term */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* ID of the question the term belongs to */,
  "term_name" TEXT /* Name of the term */,
  "term_description" TEXT /* Description of the term */,
  "term_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the term */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("term_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_terms_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES survey_questions ("question_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "study_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each study version */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study */,
  "version_name" TEXT /* Name of the study version */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the study version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the study version was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_study_versions_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "question_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each question version */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* ID of the question */,
  "version_name" TEXT /* Name of the question version */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the question version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the question version was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_question_versions_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES survey_questions ("question_id")
)
